description_long: This is a large, open-air stage structure featuring a broad set of stone steps flanked by low, decorative walls and capped with ornamental posts. At the base of the steps, there is a prominent circular platform or fountain, possibly serving as a focal point or performance area. The stage is bordered by symmetrical stonework, with planters or small decorative elements placed along the sides. The surface appears to be made of weathered stone or concrete, giving it a historic and robust appearance. The overall design is formal and monumental, suitable for public gatherings, performances, or ceremonies. The structure is elevated, with the steps providing access to the main platform area.
description: A monumental stone stage with broad steps, flanked by decorative walls and a central circular platform or fountain at its base.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the wide steps, central circular platform, and symmetrical stone walls with decorative posts.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the steps and the raised platform, with the ornamental posts visible along the edges.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the upper landing of the steps and the symmetry of the flanking walls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the full length of the steps and the stonework details.
